problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of BDNF. BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
